title: Locate the Map Overview Right-Side Information Panel
summary: Identify the right-side panel on the Map Overview screen as the area that provides additional information beyond the main map display.
when_to_use: Use this reference when orienting a user to the Map Overview screen layout and when identifying where additional information is displayed on the right side of the screen.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret specific fields, values, statuses, or controls within the right-side panel, because the source does not describe them.
Do not use this runbook if the displayed screen does not clearly match the Map Overview layout described in the source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: View the Map Overview screen and identify the right-side information panel based on the training guidance.

safety_notes: This is a screen-identification reference only.
The source does not describe any control interaction or operational changes from this panel segment.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Map Overview screen
Visual access to the HMI or training slide showing the screen layout

access_required: Access to the Map Overview screen or training material showing it
system_preconditions: A screen matching the Map Overview layout is visible

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Map Overview layout with the referenced right-side panel.

steps.title: Open or view the Map Overview screen
steps.purpose: Establish the correct screen context before identifying the panel.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Map Overview screen shown in the training material.
steps.expected_result: The Map Overview screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: A map-style interface labeled or recognizable as Map Overview is displayed.
steps.failure_condition: The visible screen does not appear to match the Map Overview layout referenced in the source.

actions.label: View Map Overview screen
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Map Overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall Map Overview layout showing a map-style interface and a right-side panel.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen shown does not clearly match the Map Overview layout described in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR weakly indicates a slide titled 'Map Overview' with a map-style interface and a right-side information panel.

steps.title: Identify the right-side panel
steps.purpose: Locate the specific panel referenced by the presenter.
steps.instruction: Look to the right side of the screen and identify the right-side panel referenced by the presenter.
steps.expected_result: The right-side panel is visually identified on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: A distinct panel area on the right side of the Map Overview screen can be distinguished from the main map area.
steps.failure_condition: The right-side panel cannot be clearly distinguished on the displayed screen.

actions.label: Locate right-side panel
actions.exact_action: Look to the right side of the screen and identify the right-side panel referenced by the presenter.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The right side of the Map Overview screen where the presenter indicates a panel.

stop_or_escalate_if: The right-side panel is not visually clear on the displayed screen.
The screen does not match the training layout closely enough to identify the panel confidently.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Presenter says the right panel gives more information and the next slide will zoom into that right panel.
Aligned transcript: 'So you see that right panel on that side.'

steps.title: Use the panel as the information area
steps.purpose: Understand the functional purpose of the identified panel.
steps.instruction: Use the identified right-side panel as the information area that provides additional details beyond the main map display.
steps.expected_result: The user understands that the right-side panel is where additional information is presented.
steps.healthy_condition: The panel is recognized as an informational area separate from the map itself.
steps.failure_condition: The user cannot determine the panel's purpose from the source-supported guidance.

actions.label: Interpret panel purpose
actions.exact_action: Use that right-side panel as the information area that provides additional details beyond the main map display.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The right-side panel as the area described as providing more information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Specific fields, values, or controls are needed, because the source does not provide that detail.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Presenter says: 'that right panel ... will give you some more information.'
Training video frame description states the presenter references a right-side panel that provides additional information.

steps.title: Compare the map area and the right-side panel
steps.purpose: Differentiate the main map-style interface from the information panel.
steps.instruction: If needed, compare the overall map area to the right-side panel to distinguish the map-style interface from the information panel.
steps.expected_result: The user can distinguish the main map display from the right-side information panel.
steps.healthy_condition: The map area and the right-side panel are recognized as separate visual regions with different purposes.
steps.failure_condition: The user still cannot distinguish the map display from the information panel.

actions.label: Compare screen regions
actions.exact_action: If needed, compare the overall map area to the right-side panel to distinguish the map-style interface from the information panel.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The main map-style area versus the separate right-side panel.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen layout remains unclear after comparison.
A more detailed panel breakdown is required, because this source segment does not provide it.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The source segment shows a screen labeled Map Overview, presented as a map-style interface within the OptiSweep training material.
The right-side panel is presented as a UI component whose purpose is to show more information about the displayed map overview context.
Artifact retrieval text describes a map-style interface with a side panel.

success_criteria: The Map Overview screen is identified.
The right-side panel is located on the screen.
The right-side panel is understood to be the area that provides additional information beyond the main map display.
healthy_conditions: A map-style Map Overview screen is visible.
A distinct right-side panel can be visually identified.
The panel is recognized as an informational area separate from the main map.
failure_conditions: The displayed screen does not clearly match the Map Overview layout described in the source.
The right-side panel cannot be clearly identified.
Specific panel contents or controls are needed but are not provided by this source segment.
escalation_guidance: Stop and seek clarification if the visible screen does not clearly match the Map Overview layout described in the source.
Escalate to SME review if specific panel fields, values, statuses, or controls must be identified, because this source does not define them.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map Overview screen layout and the right-side information panel.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Presenter says the right panel gives more information and the next slide will zoom into that right panel.

missing_details: The source does not specify the exact fields, values, or controls shown in the right-side panel.
The source does not provide a detailed interaction workflow for the panel.
The source does not provide timing, role boundaries beyond operator-level viewing, or validation steps beyond visual identification.
